name: Fluoride Varnish Application Codes
description: CDT and CPT codes for topical fluoride varnish application. Used in preventive dental/oral health measures for children, particularly dental fluoride varnish (DFV) for ages 0-6.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Topical application of fluoride — excluding varnish
Application of topical fluoride varnish by a physician or other qualified health care professional
Nutritional counseling for control of dental disease
Tobacco counseling for the control and prevention of oral disease
